prompt: Position comparison: UTG opens before anyone else acts. Compared with the button first-in range, classify the UTG range quality.
why_v1: Stronger on average means the early-position range starts with fewer hands and keeps more strong hands.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. UTG is stronger on average because early position usually starts with fewer, stronger hands.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. UTG is stronger on average because acting early leaves more players behind, so the range starts tighter.
